name: imgix
description: imgix provides a Management API for managing sources, assets, and purges, plus a Rendering API for real-time image processing via URL parameters. Transform, optimize, and deliver images by appending query parameters for resize, crop, format conversion, text overlays, and effects.

auth.note: Management API uses Bearer token. Rendering API uses URL parameters on your imgix domain.

capabilities.name: sources_list
capabilities.description: List all imgix sources in your account.

capabilities.name: sources_create
capabilities.description: Create and deploy a new imgix source.

capabilities.name: sources_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details for a single source.

capabilities.name: assets_get
capabilities.description: Get details for a single asset.

capabilities.name: assets_update
capabilities.description: Update asset metadata (categories, description, custom fields).

capabilities.name: assets_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a single asset to a source.

capabilities.name: assets_add
capabilities.description: Queue a path from your origin to be added to imgix for processing.

capabilities.name: assets_refresh
capabilities.description: Refresh and reprocess an asset from the origin.

capabilities.name: purge_create
capabilities.description: Purge cached derivative copies of an asset from the CDN.

capabilities.name: assets_unpublish
capabilities.description: Remove an asset from CDN delivery temporarily.

capabilities.name: assets_publish
capabilities.description: Restore a previously unpublished asset to CDN delivery.

capabilities.name: render_resize
capabilities.description: Resize an image by specifying width, height, and fit mode via URL parameters.

capabilities.name: render_format
capabilities.description: Convert image format and optimize quality via URL parameters.

capabilities.name: render_crop
capabilities.description: Crop an image with focal point, face detection, or entropy-based smart cropping.

capabilities.name: render_text_overlay
capabilities.description: Render text on top of an image with font, size, color control.

capabilities.name: render_watermark
capabilities.description: Overlay a watermark image on top of a base image.

capabilities.name: render_effects
capabilities.description: Apply visual effects: blur, sharpen, sepia, monochrome, contrast adjustments.
